🌟 Pangrams

TRAINEDDETRAIN

All Answers (19 words)

TRAINED adjective Pangram

Having been taught a particular skill.

DETRAIN verb Pangram

To alight from a train.

TIRADE noun

A long, angry speech.

RETAIN verb

To keep possession of.

RETINA noun

The light-sensitive layer at the back of the eye.

TRADE noun

The buying and selling of goods.

TRAIN noun

A series of connected vehicles.

DRAIN verb

To cause liquid to flow away.

IRATE adjective

Feeling or characterized by great anger.

NADIR noun

The lowest point of something.

RAID noun

A sudden attack on an enemy.

RAIN noun

Water falling from clouds.

RANT verb

To speak or shout at length in an angry way.

READ verb

To look at and understand written text.

REIN noun

A strap used to control a horse.

RIDE verb

To sit on and control a moving animal or vehicle.

RIND noun

The tough outer layer of fruit.

TREND noun

A general direction of change.

TRIAD noun

A group of three related things.
